sweep: 2026-07-12 fresh alpha sweep on market data (alphasweep)

method.label: up_i = 1 if o[i+1] >= o[i] (open-to-open, ties Up; 13 exact ties; 20.9% of intervals <2bps where resolution noise ~11%)
method.fill_assumption: 51c (ask 50c + 1c slip) for the predicted side; breakeven q*(0.51)=0.52753 incl gas 0.004c/share
method.split: TRAIN May 11 - Jun 26 00:00 UTC (13,105 intervals), TEST Jun 26 - Jul 13 03:40 (4,940)
method.family4_split: cb1m only exists Jun 26+: TRAIN' Jun 26 - Jul 5, TEST' Jul 5 - Jul 13 (candidate-grade only)
method.pvals: 1h-block bootstrap (2000-4000 reps), one-sided vs EV<=0; 90% CI
method.selection: per sub-family best TRAIN ev_c with TRAIN n>=250 (n>=150 family 4), evaluated once on TEST

headline: ZERO of 204 grid cells / 16 pre-registered picks clear the bar (TRAIN p<0.01 AND positive TEST persistence). Of 170 evaluable 5m cells, exactly 2 cleared TRAIN p<0.01 and both failed TEST: vnorm_k12_z2_rev (TRAIN +4.16c p=.0075 -> TEST +0.49c p=.43) and wick_0.65_wickfade (TRAIN +2.70c p=.006 -> TEST -1.58c p=.82).

gate_refresh_frozen_params.note: deployed impulse gate eff6>=0.10 & cnt12<=6, 12bps trigger, zero refit, independent pipeline
gate_refresh_frozen_params.unpaired_gate_increment: TRAIN +1.83c, TEST +1.31c, fresh +2.86c - directionally positive everywhere, never individually significant (consistent with prior 'level real, increment unproven')

near_misses_all_rejected.ethdiv_thr10bps_fade: TEST +4.79c p=.012 n=610 BUT TRAIN -1.09c p=.81 -> TRAIN->TEST sign flip, terminal by program standard; also correlated with the known reversal (fires on ETH-led divergence in a reversal-friendly TEST period)
near_misses_all_rejected.volspike_body_m3_rev: sign-consistent (TRAIN +1.70c p=.20 n=584; TEST +4.08c p=.11 n=227) but never significant; at most a shadow-book candidate
near_misses_all_rejected.trig12_backloaded_rev: increment on the DEPLOYED signal: contrarian after 12bps trigger whose last-2m delivered >=60% of the move; TRAIN' +8.69c p=.0075 n=153 -> TEST' +1.30c p=.38 n=111 (frontloaded control +3.87c -> +1.09c). Decayed; candidate-grade only, short 1m history (16.7d)
near_misses_all_rejected.eth_k3_thr30bps_fade: TRAIN +1.45c p=.07, TEST +2.21c p=.08 - sign-consistent, never clears either bar; overlaps BTC reversal (ETH-BTC 5m correlation)

fill_realism_caveat: 51c assumption favors contrarian-side signals (validated live fill quantiles .45/.49/.51). Momentum-direction cells (all dead anyway) would fill 62-65c per prior work, making them MORE dead. No finding depends on optimistic fills.

data_caveats.bn5m/premium/oi end Jul 9-10: family 2 TEST windows shortened accordingly; OI lagged one interval for publication delay; OI TRAIN only Jun 10-25
data_caveats.cb1m starts Jun 26: family 4 uses its own short sub-split entirely inside the program TEST window
